audit_items.proof_trace: The pre-check loop at L140-150 iterates all unverifiedReports and reverts with FeedNotAllowlisted if any s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset[feedId] == address(0), before verifyBulk is called at L153. Solidity transaction atomicity precludes any state change between the pre-check and the verifyBulk call, and feed ID extraction (bytes32(reportData)) is consistent with the post-verification ReportV3.dataStreamsFeedId decode. verifyBulk has only one production call site (L153) with no bypass path.
